title: SimplyFine
description: Fast OptiFine-alternative that focuses on simplicity.
body:
# Modpack is archived. Use Additive instead.

# ⚙️SimplyFine

SimplyFine (**SIF** for short) is a lightweight **Fabric** modpack, that brings **All OptiFine Features**. It contains only optimization and OptiFine-Features, while not adding anything extra™.

## ❓ Difference between Additive

Smaller number of bundled mods. That's it. Not adding anything™ besides optimization + OptiFine parity mods.

<details>
<summary>Mod list</summary>

## Optimization

- [BBE](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities)
- [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fast Noise](https://modrinth.com/mod/zfastnoise)
- [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

## OptiFine Features

- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) (1.21.6+ - [Cape Provider](https://modrinth.com/mod/cape-provider))
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (1.16.5-1.21.1)
- [Colormatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/colormatic) (1.18.2, 1.19.2), 1.20+ - [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Nuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit)
- [Nuit Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit-interop) (1.16.5-1.21.4), 1.21.6+ - [Optiboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/optiboxes)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass) (1.16.5 - 1.19.2), **1.20+*** - [BetterGrassify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettergrassify)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) (1.20.6 - [RyoamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/ryoamiclights))
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)
- [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) (1.18.2 - 1.20.4), 1.16.5, 1.20.6+ - [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer)

## Some other mods...

- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) (1.16.5-1.21.10)
- [YOSBR](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr) - Saves your settings after modpack updates

### * 1.19.4 replaces Better Grass with [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass) resource pack.

</details>

## 🔥 Performance

SIF provides similar performance as Additive.
The overall performance may vary depending on the scenario.

## ❓ How to increase performance even more?

You can look at **[SIF wiki](https://github.com/ImGRUI/SimplyFine/wiki)** that contains [Post-Install](https://github.com/ImGRUI/SimplyFine/wiki/Post%E2%80%90Install) information. Make sure to check [FAQ](https://github.com/ImGRUI/SimplyFine/wiki/FAQ) too!

<hr>

<details>
<summary>Other...</summary>

## Version Support Policy

I aim to support primarily LTS versions (e.g. 1.20.1, 1.21.1). Some older versions may be dropped (1.16.5), as there's not much mod/config updates that affect them in major way. I may update them someday, but that's highly unlikely.

~~You can always see what versions I aim to support by viewing if it's Featured or not.~~ Modrinth removed Featured versions, so from now on you can't view that.

<hr>

## Release channels

If special version is tagged as "Alpha" or "Beta", that doesn't always mean it's unstable - most of the time it means if there's all mods available.

Current channel is decided by this simple algorithm:

**Release** - All mods are available, version is stable. Might also be when there's one/two mods missing cause they'll not be updated on this version (for example, CIT Resewn on 1.21.4).  
**Beta** - Modpack is missing 5 or less not that **critical*** mods.  
**Alpha** - Modpack is missing 5-6 and more critical/not critical mods. Also has 0.x version format.

\* - By critical mods I mean OptiFine most essential mods alternatives, for example, Continuity.

</details>
